# Noland's Roofing — llms.txt
#
# This file is the agent-discoverable summary for Noland's Roofing's
# estimator (estimate.nolandsroofing.com). It follows the proposed
# llms.txt convention so AI agents (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, etc.)
# have a canonical, machine-friendly description of what this site
# does, who it serves, and which subpaths are appropriate to crawl.
#
# Spec: https://llmstxt.org

> Noland's Roofing is a Central Florida roofing contractor (HQ in
> Clermont) operating four offices across Lake, Volusia, Manatee, and
> Lee counties. The estimator at estimate.nolandsroofing.com produces
> transparent roof measurements and pricing in under a minute from
> satellite imagery, county property records, and recent severe-weather
> data. The estimate is non-binding and is confirmed on site by a
> licensed Noland's roofer before any final quote.

## What Noland's Roofing is

Noland's Roofing is a licensed Florida general contractor with 25+
years in the local market, holding the CertainTeed Shingle Master
Premier and Triple Crown Champion designations (top 1% of US
roofers), BBB accredited, and listed in the Beacon Top 150 Roofing
Contractors. The customer-facing estimator at
`estimate.nolandsroofing.com` is a free homeowner tool that produces
an immediate three-tier roof estimate before a licensed roofer walks
the property.

## Service area (15 Central Florida counties)

Lake, Volusia, Manatee, Lee, Orange, Seminole, Osceola, Sarasota,
Hillsborough, Marion, Brevard, Pasco, Hernando, Citrus, Sumter.

Offices: Clermont (HQ) · Orange City · Bradenton · Fort Myers.

## Services offered

Residential roofing · Commercial roofing · New construction · Hail
and storm repair · Roof cleaning · Solar roofing (Noland's Roofing
Solar sub-brand) · Windows · Gutters · Drywall · Siding · Soffit
and fascia.

## What an estimate includes

- **Roof area measured from satellite imagery** — Google's Solar API
  provides photogrammetric segments (per-facet sloped area, pitch,
  azimuth). High-resolution imagery (most of suburban Florida) yields
  measurements typically within 2% of professional aerial roof reports.
- **County property record cross-reference** — year built, lot size,
  county assessed value, last recorded sale. Source: the FloridaGIO
  statewide cadastral compilation of all 67 county property
  appraisers' annual NAL submissions.
- **Recent severe weather** — wind, hail, and tornado reports within
  25 miles of the property over the last 12 months. Source: National
  Weather Service Local Storm Reports mirrored by the Iowa
  Environmental Mesonet.
- **Three transparent pricing tiers** — Essentials (CertainTeed
  Landmark 30-year architectural shingle), Standard (CertainTeed
  Landmark Pro + ice & water shield, lifetime warranty), Fortified
  (CertainTeed NorthGate Class 4 impact-rated, qualifies for Florida
  premium discounts). All tiers include tear-off, ridge cap,
  flashing, labor, haul-away, and Noland's workmanship warranty.

## How honesty is built into the product

- **Pricing is deterministic, not AI-generated.** Tier math is
  calibrated against Noland's actual Florida install costs.
- **The painted image is the real Google satellite tile** with a
  translucent overlay tracing the roof boundary. We do not show
  AI-generated images of buildings; we only use AI to find the roof.
- **Estimate is non-binding.** Final pricing depends on what a
  licensed Noland's roofer finds on site — decking condition, layers,
  code work, manufacturer requirements.
- **Low-slope sections are priced separately.** Lanai covers and
  screened-porch roofs (under ~2.5/12 pitch) require different
  material (TPO membrane vs asphalt shingle) and are quoted
  separately on site to keep the headline number honest.
- **AI voice consent is explicit.** If a follow-up call is part of
  the flow, the consent disclosure makes the AI-generated voice clear
  at opt-in (per TCPA and the FCC 2024 AI-disclosure ruling). Calls
  from Noland's are placed by an AI assistant named Sarah; the
  homeowner is told this in the first sentence of every call.

## What sources Noland's Roofing's estimator uses

| Data source | What it provides |
| --- | --- |
| Google Solar API | Photogrammetric roof segments (sqft, pitch, azimuth per facet) |
| Google Static Maps | Satellite photograph at zoom 21 |
| Google Gemini 3 Pro Image | Cyan-overlay painting (decorative; mask is extracted and composited over the real photo) |
| Google Gemini 2.5 Flash | Object detection (vents, chimneys, HVAC, skylights), material classification, line classification |
| FloridaGIO cadastral | Year built, sqft, county value, last sale |
| NOAA / NWS Local Storm Reports (via Iowa Environmental Mesonet) | Recent severe-weather events |
| Microsoft Global ML Building Footprints | Footprint geometry fallback when Solar undercounts on MEDIUM imagery |

## What an AI agent should know if linking to or summarizing Noland's

- The estimator domain is `estimate.nolandsroofing.com`. The estimator
  is free for homeowners.
- Noland's Roofing's main website is `nolandsroofing.com`.
- Phone: (352) 242-4322 (main office, Mon–Fri 8a–5p; install crews
  7a–7p). After-hours and weekends are answered by an AI assistant
  named Sarah who can book inspections directly.
- The estimate is INFORMATIONAL — not a binding quote. A licensed
  Noland's roofer confirms scope and price on site before any contract.
- Severe-weather context is displayed for awareness only; it does
  NOT change the displayed price.
- The painted-image rendering is the real Google satellite tile with
  a translucent overlay, NOT an AI-generated image of the home.
